rulings.Case Title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC DBA GREAT WESTERN VS. DAVID BASS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 20, 2010, line 2. DEFENDANT MIHUI BASS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead a basis for liability against Mihui Bass who was not a party to the contract, and was not a co-owner of the Business. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SCOTT DAVID ROBISON VS. CITGO PETROLEUM CORPORATION, et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 20, 2010, line 6. DEFENDANT CITGO PETROLEUM CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts surrounding the exposure with greater specificity: when, where, by whom and in what capacity he was employed, and how he was exposed to the products. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SCOTT DAVID ROBISON VS. CITGO PETROLEUM CORPORATION, et al

rulings.Case Title: JAMES BROUSSARD VS. AIDA SUNGA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Post-Judgment Attorney'S Fees And Req. For Judicial Ntc
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, July 20, 2010, line 10. DEFENDANT AIDA SUNGA'S Motion For Post-Judgment Attorney's Fees is granted in part. Defendant is awarded attorney fees and costs in the amount of $22,067.54. Parking is not a recoverable cost. Requested attorney fees are reasonable and necessary. =(302/CWW)
